events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate sequence violation for torque & threaded fastening. Scenario: torque sequence pattern violated (spiral/star from center - SEQ). Work in-progress. Need decision fail because non-compliant. Risk high? Torque sequence violation can cause uneven clamping, gasket failure, leaks, bolt fatigue. In production floor quality gates. Component condition installed-defective because installed but sequence wrong. Percent complete maybe 50? Value none. Sound etc default empty/zero. Workable maybe none until corrected. Findings: torque sequence not followed; fasteners may be unevenly loaded. Actions: stop work, loosen fasteners, follow OEM specified sequence (star/spiral from center), retorque to spec, inspect/verify. Rationale. References: OEM/engineering specs, maybe ASME PCC-1? But reference material says OEM/engineering specs. Could include "OEM torque specification and sequence". Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside.
